entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A non-model grain and fodder crop adapted to extremely hot and dry environments globally.

entities.name: HOT AND DRY ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Extreme environmental conditions to which pearl millet is adapted.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where investment in pearl millet single cross hybrids is significant.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet production relies heavily on open pollinated varieties.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-GENETIC MALE STERILITY (CMS) SYSTEM
entities.description: A biological system used to develop single cross hybrids in pearl millet.

entities.name: SINGLE CROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids developed using the CMS system for improved traits.

entities.name: OPEN POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: Pearl millet varieties commonly used in Africa.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring physical traits of inbred parents and hybrids.

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism using sequencing techniques.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach using genomic data to select for improved traits.

entities.name: RAD-SEQ
entities.description: A genotyping-by-sequencing technique used to generate genetic data.

entities.name: TGBS
entities.description: A genotyping-by-sequencing technique that yielded more informative SNPs than RAD-seq.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as informative markers for genomic prediction.

entities.name: GENOMIC PREDICTION
entities.description: A scheme used to estimate the breeding values of hybrids based on genomic and phenotypic data.

entities.name: 1000-GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: A phenotypic trait measured for genomic prediction in pearl millet.

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: A phenotypic trait measured for genomic prediction in pearl millet.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A phenotypic trait measured for genomic prediction in pearl millet.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A phenotypic trait measured for genomic prediction in pearl millet.

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superior performance of hybrid offspring compared to the average of their parents.

entities.name: GENOMIC ESTIMATED BREEDING VALUES
entities.description: Predicted values representing the genetic merit of an individual.
